vault.label: W1
vault.notes: Idle, non-trading. Receives 50% of every realized profitable exit.

trading_wallets.label: W9
trading_wallets.notes: Normal-scan trades capped at 0.15 SOL regardless of balance pct. freshSnipe:true enables Sniper Mode Priority — real-time pump.fun discovery, relaxed 0.45 gate + $10k liq in the first few minutes, up to 65% of balance (hard-capped at 0.6 SOL) once a token clears the 1-5min window and passes core safety checks.

trading_wallets.label: W8
trading_wallets.notes: Copies W9's entries (the historically stronger performer: +6.26 SOL / 51% WR vs W8's own -9.65 SOL / 42% WR), including fresh-snipe entries. Falls back to its own independent 0.70-gate scan only when W9 has nothing open to mirror.
